A.title: Beach Sunset, Sitting
A.full_prompt: Beach setting, late afternoon golden hour light. Subject sitting naturally on warm sand, relaxed posture. Hair moving gently in ocean breeze. Wearing simple white casual top and neutral bottoms. Looking out toward horizon line, peaceful contemplative expression. Soft warm sunlight catching highlights. Sand texture visible around subject. Ocean horizon blurred in background. Shallow depth of field emphasizing face and shoulders. Candid moment, natural and unstaged. Professional editorial beach photography style. Warm color palette with golden tones. Cinematic composition. Natural photograph. No modifications.

B.title: Beach Standing, Full Body
B.full_prompt: Beach environment, midday natural sunlight with slight cloud cover. Subject standing in relaxed confident pose, full body visible. White linen outfit in casual beachwear style. Hair catching light breeze. Natural subtle smile or focused expression. Warm sand and water visible framing the subject. Golden hour glow on skin tone. Relaxed shoulders, weight shifted naturally. Professional portrait photography style. Wide depth of field capturing full body and environment. Composition with negative space suggesting ocean and sky. Fresh natural beach day aesthetic. Color-graded warm and inviting. Natural photograph. No modifications.

C.title: Studio Portrait, Closeup
C.full_prompt: Studio setting with professional key lighting. Tight portrait composition focusing on face and shoulders. Neutral gray or white backdrop, clean and minimalist. Professional studio lighting setup creating dimensional shadows. Subject with direct engaging expression, confident and composed. Clear skin detail visible with natural texture. Eyes sharp and defined with natural catchlight from studio key light. Hair styled neatly. Simple neutral clothing or studio backdrop. Professional portrait photography technique. Medium depth of field with sharp focus on eyes. Cinematic lighting quality. Color-graded neutral and flattering. Studio portrait quality 9.0+/10. Natural photograph. No modifications.

D.title: Home Lifestyle, Sitting
D.full_prompt: Home interior setting with natural window light or casual indoor ambiance. Subject sitting comfortably on couch or chair, relaxed posture. Wearing cozy casual loungewear or oversized comfortable clothing. Soft natural light creating warm intimate atmosphere. Candid lifestyle moment, genuine and unposed feeling. Bookshelves or home decor softly visible in background. Warm color palette with cream and neutral tones. Subject looking relaxed, maybe scrolling phone or reading, or gazing thoughtfully. Natural expression. Lifestyle photography style, documentary feel. Professional interior lighting. Shallow depth of field. Comfortable home setting. Natural photograph. No modifications.

E.title: Athletic/Travel, Action
E.full_prompt: Outdoor travel or athletic setting with golden hour natural light. Subject in active dynamic pose suggesting movement or activity. Athletic or casual travel outfit appropriate for adventure. Hair and clothing catching motion or breeze effect. Energetic confident expression. Natural scenic background with depth. Golden warm lighting on skin. Professional athletic or travel photography style. Wide composition showing environment and activity. Dynamic angle suggesting movement. Color-graded warm and vibrant. Outdoor adventure aesthetic. Fast shutter feel capturing moment of action. Natural photograph. No modifications.
